description: Trusty contains a vulnerability in all TAs whose deserializer does not reject messages with multiple occurrences of the same parameter. The deserialization of untrusted data might allow an attacker to exploit the deserializer to impact code execution.

product.name: NVIDIA Jetson TX2 series, TX2 NX, AGX Xavier series, Xavier NX

enisaIdProduct.product_version: All Jetson Linux versions prior to  r32.5.1
